title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.650 - Further entries to be made in docket
text:
511.650.  Further entries to be made in docket. — Such docket shall contain, in columns ruled for that purpose: First, the names of the parties; second, the date; third, the nature of the judgment or decree; fourth, the amount of debt, damages and costs; fifth, the book and page in which it is entered; sixth, a column for entering a note of the satisfaction or other disposition thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 1296) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1131; 1919 § 1582; 1909 § 2151
